author: jamiefdhurst
description: Creates new periodic notes automatically in the background and allows these to be pinned in your open tabs, requires the Periodic Notes plugin.

manifest.author: Jamie Hurst
manifest.description: Creates new periodic notes automatically in the background and allows these to be pinned in your open tabs, requires the Periodic Notes plugin.
manifest.name: Auto Periodic Notes

name: Auto Periodic Notes
